title: Emergency release races and joins every input writer

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
Ordinary keyboard, pointer, macro, wheel, and Reliable Paste producers can be started, proven active or queued, and deterministically paused at release race boundaries before emergency release.
The harness provisions every cleanup-failure call in its own restored ready session generation with a tool-unique session, request, and separately captured fresh observation when required.

fault_script.action: Start ordinary keyboard, pointer, macro, wheel, and Reliable Paste producers in generation 7; prove each producer active or queued; pause each at its release race boundary; then race only release-all-input against them.
fault_script.expected_effect: Release closes the gate before any paused suffix can write, drains and joins every producer, and returns correlated zero-state facts for generation 7.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear every release-race barrier and injector after the one linked emergency-release call.
fault_script.expected_effect: All generation-7 producers are joined, no later tool inherits a race injector, and the drained generation is never reused.

fault_script.action: Restore the fixture baseline, provision ready case-owned session opaque-session-cleanup-failure-input-keyboard generation 8, capture opaque-observation-cleanup-failure-input-keyboard, and arm a one-shot cleanup failure for only the next jetkvm_input_keyboard call.
fault_script.expected_effect: The keyboard operation reaches its cleanup branch in fresh generation 8 and retains cleanup-phase error evidence without replay or fabricated restoration.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the keyboard cleanup injector, inspect and emergency-release generation 8, close its case-owned session, and restore the fixture baseline.
fault_script.expected_effect: No keyboard fault or generation-8 state reaches the next case.

fault_script.action: Provision ready case-owned session opaque-session-cleanup-failure-input-mouse generation 9, capture opaque-observation-cleanup-failure-input-mouse, and arm a one-shot cleanup failure for only the next jetkvm_input_mouse call.
fault_script.expected_effect: The mouse operation reaches its cleanup branch in fresh generation 9 and retains cleanup-phase error evidence without replay or fabricated restoration.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the mouse cleanup injector, inspect and emergency-release generation 9, close its case-owned session, and restore the fixture baseline.
fault_script.expected_effect: No mouse fault or generation-9 state reaches the next case.

fault_script.action: Provision ready case-owned session opaque-session-cleanup-failure-input-paste generation 10, capture opaque-observation-cleanup-failure-input-paste, and arm a one-shot cleanup failure for only the next jetkvm_input_paste call.
fault_script.expected_effect: The paste operation reaches its cleanup branch in fresh generation 10 and retains cleanup-phase error evidence without replay or fabricated restoration.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the paste cleanup injector, inspect and emergency-release generation 10, stop and join Reliable Paste, close its case-owned session, and restore the fixture baseline.
fault_script.expected_effect: No paste fault, producer, or generation-10 state reaches the next case.

fault_script.action: Provision ready case-owned session opaque-session-cleanup-failure-input-release generation 11 and arm a one-shot cleanup failure for only the next jetkvm_input_release call.
fault_script.expected_effect: The release operation reaches its cleanup branch in fresh generation 11 and retains cleanup-phase error evidence without replay or fabricated restoration.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the release cleanup injector, independently verify zero held state for generation 11, close its case-owned session, and restore the fixture baseline.
fault_script.expected_effect: No release fault or drained generation-11 state reaches the next case.

fault_script.action: Provision ready case-owned session opaque-session-cleanup-failure-power-control generation 12 and arm a one-shot cleanup failure for only the next jetkvm_power_control call.
fault_script.expected_effect: The ATX operation reaches its cleanup branch in fresh generation 12 and retains cleanup-phase error evidence without replay or fabricated restoration.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the power cleanup injector, inspect and emergency-release generation 12, restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline, close its case-owned session, and restore the fixture baseline.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next case begins only after generation 12 is retired and the recorded power baseline is proven.

fault_script.action: Verify the fixture baseline with no active incumbent session and arm a one-shot cleanup failure for only the next jetkvm_session_connect call.
fault_script.expected_effect: The connect operation reaches its cleanup branch with its unique request and retains cleanup-phase error evidence without replay or fabricated restoration.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the connect cleanup injector, resolve and close any case-owned session produced by the ambiguous connect cleanup, and restore the fixture baseline.
fault_script.expected_effect: No connect fault, ownership attempt, browser, or channel reaches the reconnect case.

fault_script.action: Provision ready case-owned session opaque-session-cleanup-failure-session-reconnect generation 13 and arm a one-shot cleanup failure for only the next jetkvm_session_reconnect call.
fault_script.expected_effect: The reconnect operation reaches its cleanup branch in fresh generation 13 and retains cleanup-phase error evidence without replay or fabricated restoration.

fault_script.action: Unconditionally clear the reconnect cleanup injector, resolve the attempted successor, emergency-release any published case generation, close its browser and session, and restore the fixture baseline.
fault_script.expected_effect: No reconnect fault, stale generation, browser, or channel survives the final case.

steps.expect: The gate closes, generations drain, producers join, paste stops, and correlated zero-state facts are returned.
The jetkvm_input_keyboard cleanup-phase error evidence is retained without fabricating restoration or replaying the operation.
The jetkvm_input_mouse cleanup-phase error evidence is retained without fabricating restoration or replaying the operation.
The jetkvm_input_paste cleanup-phase error evidence is retained without fabricating restoration or replaying the operation.
The jetkvm_input_release cleanup-phase error evidence is retained without fabricating restoration or replaying the operation.
The jetkvm_power_control cleanup-phase error evidence is retained without fabricating restoration or replaying the operation.
The jetkvm_session_connect cleanup-phase error evidence is retained without fabricating restoration or replaying the operation.
The jetkvm_session_reconnect cleanup-phase error evidence is retained without fabricating restoration or replaying the operation.

pass.assertion: Each linked cleanup-failure tool runs under its own one-shot injector in an independently restored ready case generation with unique session, request, and observation identifiers; cleanup-phase evidence remains authoritative and no tool fabricates restoration.

Every keyboard, pointer, macro, wheel, and paste producer is proven active or queued before release; none emits after its release acknowledgement, and each later cleanup-failure case starts only after the prior case is unconditionally cleared, released, closed, and restored.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.
The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

restore.action: Restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline using the reviewed fixture procedure while retaining the device lease.
restore.assertion: The baseline ATX-observable state is proven before the next story starts.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
